openclaw_whatsapp._comment: WhatsApp is a separate channel plugin (not bundled in openclaw). Pin MUST stay peer-compatible with openclaw.version above: @openclaw/whatsapp declares peerDependencies.openclaw and compat.pluginApi (e.g. 2026.5.28 requires openclaw>=2026.5.28). Bump this in lockstep with openclaw.version. Telegram is bundled in core and needs no pin.
